{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} | type = Shinto | not_children = | not_father = | not_consort = | not_mother = |ignore = is one of the {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|goodbye $1/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=}}.goodbye $1 | Name = Torinaruminokami | Generation = {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} (7th Generation) | Predecessor = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}|Successor = {{ill|Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}} | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}|Full Name = 鳥鳴海神 (Torinaruminokami) | Alternate Name= | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of Rituals | Mausoleum = | father = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}} | mother = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}|Relatives = | consort = {{ill|Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|lt=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|lt=Hinateru Nukatabimichioikochini no Kami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateru Nukatabimichioikochini no Kami|qq=}} | children = {{ill|Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}|cult_centre = {{Plainlist| * Narumi Shrine * Ueki Shrine * Tahika Shrine|qq=draft}} | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kojiki|qq=}} }}
'''Torinarumi-no-Kami''' (鳥鳴海神, トリナルミ, {{lang-en|Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=draft}}) is a {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=deity in Japanese mythology|1=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Torinarumi-no-Kami is a deity mentioned in the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} and belongs to the {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} (とおまりななよのかみ). This deity is classified as a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} and is only described by name in the text. The name is interpreted as "a bird that carries spirits, resonating through the sea"{{Sfn|Nishimiya|2014|p=381}}.
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (according to the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red female deities, and yellow indicates unknown gender.]] Torinarumi-no-Kami was born from the union of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} and his wife, {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}}, the daughter of {{ill|Yashimajin|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|1=Yashimamuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimajin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}. Torinarumi-no-Kami married {{ill|Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and gave birth to {{ill|Kuninobutomi-no-Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninobutomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
== Shrines enshrining Torinarumi-no-Kami == * '''Narumi Shrine''' ({{ill|Inuyama, Aichi|en|Inuyama, Aichi|WD=Q503411|lt=Inuyama|1=Inuyama, Aichi}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}) - Main deity * '''Ueki Shrine''' ({{ill|Iga, Mie|en|Iga, Mie|WD=Q460820|lt=Iga|1=Iga, Mie}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}) - Enshrined alongside others * '''Tabika Shrine''' (Komono Town, [[:en:Mie District, Mie|Mie District, Mie Prefecture]]) - Included in a [[Shrine Consolidation Policy|merger]]
*
== Family Tree == {{Eight generations of Izumo}}
== Related articles == * {{ill|Kayanarumi no Kami|lt=Kayanarumi no Kami|lt=Kayanarumi|ja|カヤナルミ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayanarumi|qq=}} - A deity appearing in the ''{{ill|Engishiki|en|Engishiki|WD=Q1342448|lt=Engishiki|1=Engishiki}}'' (巻八, ''Izumo Province Norito''), thought to have a connection due to the shared element "Narumi." * {{ill|Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - The thirteenth generation deity among the Completion tier 3]] |ref={{SfnRef|Nishimiya|2014}} |author=[[Kazutami Nishimiya]] 校注 |isbn=978-4-10-620801-0 |series=[[Shinchō Nihon Koten Shūsei]] (new edition)}}
== Notes ==
=== References === {{Reflist}}
== Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書 |title=古事記 |volume= |date=2014th year 10月30日 |publisher=[[Shinchōsha]]
}}
== External links == * [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/torinaruminokami/ Torinarumi-no-Kami – Kokugakuin University Classic Culture Project] * [https://www.city.inuyama.aichi.jp/kurashi/bunka/1001063/1001069.html List of Shrines | Inuyama City] * [http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e6%a4%8d%e6%9c%a8%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/ Mie Prefecture Shrine Association » Ueki Shrine] * [http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e5%a4%9a%e6%af%94%e9%b9%bf%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/ Mie Prefecture Shrine Association » Tabika Shrine]
